activity.title: Activity
activity.undoFailed: Pige could not safely undo this change.
activity.undoStateUnknown: Pige could not verify whether this change was undone. Reopen Pige before trying again.
backup.actionFailed: Pige could not verify the backup result. Reopen this page before trying again.
backup.failedFinal: The backup could not continue safely. Choose Create Backup to select a new destination.
backup.failedRetryable: The backup stopped safely. Retry continues with the same backup identity.
backup.modeCloneDescription: Keep the current vault and create an independent copy.
backup.modeReplaceDescription: Recover this logical vault while preserving its identity.
backup.replaceWarning: Pige will close the current vault and create a rollback backup before replacement.
backup.restoreFailed: Pige could not safely continue this restore. Try again.
backup.restoreInvalid: This backup cannot be restored because validation found invalid files.
backup.statusEntryOnly: Backup and restore are designed, but this build only exposes the settings entry point.
backup.statusNoVault: Open or create a vault before creating a backup. Existing backups can still be restored.
backup.statusReady: Backup and restore are available. Backups exclude rebuildable indexes, caches, local models, and secrets.
backup.title: Backup and Restore
counts.title: Counts
development.settingsDescription: This area is part of the complete interface and will connect to its real service in a later update.
development.state.development: In development. This action does not change your vault.
field.name: Name
firstRun.createDescription: Choose a parent folder and create a new local knowledge base.
firstRun.openDescription: Choose an existing Pige vault folder.
firstRun.restoreDescription: Preview versions, counts, warnings, and identity mode before choosing a destination.
firstRun.restoreHint: Choose a Pige backup and preview it before restoring.
firstRun.subtitle: Create or open a local vault before capturing knowledge.
firstRun.title: Choose your local knowledge base
home.heroSubtitle: Ask, paste content, or add files; Pige uses local knowledge when helpful
home.cloudCallAttempted: A cloud model call was attempted for this question.
home.cloudSend: Cloud model active; only selected evidence is sent.
home.agentState.failed: The Agent could not complete this request.
home.agentState.waiting: The Agent is waiting for setup or permission.
home.createVaultBeforeDrop: Create or open a vault first.
home.oneFilePerTurn: Attach one file per Agent request.
home.sourceTurnCompleted: Pi Agent finished processing the attached source.
home.firstGuideText: You can save content now. Connect a model to ask Pi Agent.
home.modelEgress.confirmAll: Your stricter cloud-send setting requires approval for this model call.
home.modelEgress.loading: Checking the exact model send before showing actions.
home.modelEgress.privateOrLarge: This selected context is private or larger than your confirmation threshold.
home.modelEgress.resolveFailed: The decision was not saved. Review it and try again.
home.modelEgress.sensitive: This selected context is marked sensitive and requires approval for this send.
home.modelEgress.title: Send this context to the configured model?
home.modelEgress.unknown: Pige could not verify the pending decision. Reopen this vault before deciding.
home.modelEgress.unknownBoundary: The model destination is new, changed, or not yet verified.
home.permission.loading: Checking the pending permission before showing actions.
home.permission.resolveFailed: The decision was not saved. Try again.
home.permission.title: Permission needed
home.permission.unknown: Pige could not verify the pending permission. Reopen this vault before deciding.
home.voice.recordingDescription: Stopped text stays editable and is not sent automatically.
home.voice.assetsUnavailableDescription: This Mac supports voice input, but the selected on-device language asset is not installed. Installation starts only when you choose it.
home.voice.installingAssetDescription: macOS is installing the selected on-device language asset. Keep Pige open until it finishes.
home.voice.assetReadyDescription: Voice input is ready for this language. Start when you are ready.
home.voice.assetInstallFailedTitle: Could not install the language asset
home.voice.assetInstallFailedDescription: Nothing was recorded. You can retry the explicit installation without changing your current input.
home.voice.requestingPermissionDescripti: Pige starts listening only after macOS grants access. No audio is sent to a model provider.
home.voice.stoppedDescription: Review the local transcript, then place it in the composer when you are ready.
home.voice.transcribingDescription: Pige is finishing the transcript on this Mac. It will not be sent automatically.
home.voice.readyDescription: Place it in the composer to edit before sending.
home.voice.failedDescription: No audio or transcript was sent. Your existing composer text is unchanged.
home.voice.unsupportedTitle: Voice input is not available yet
home.voice.unsupportedDescription: You can still type, paste, or add files. Pige will not download components or block your current input.
home.voice.permissionDescription: Pige did not record anything. You can keep typing or allow microphone access in System Settings and try again.
home.sourceSavedWaitingModel: Source saved. Connect a model for the Agent to continue.
home.modelSwitchFailed: Could not switch models. Try again.
errors.model_provider.call_failed: The model service did not complete this answer. Try again.
errors.model_provider.default_model_miss: Connect a model service before asking Pi Agent.
errors.model_provider.binding_unusable: The default model connection needs repair in Models.
errors.model_provider.egress_blocked: Pige blocked this question from being sent to the model service.
errors.model_provider.egress_confirmatio: This model service needs cloud-send approval. Choose a reviewed service to continue here.
errors.model_provider.egress_denied: This model send was not allowed. Your input and sources remain saved.
errors.model_provider.output_invalid: The model returned an answer Pige could not validate. Try again.
errors.permission.confirmation_required: This external action needs your permission.
errors.permission.binding_changed: The external action changed before it could run, so Pige stopped it.
errors.permission.completion_uncertain: The external action may have completed, but Pige could not verify it safely and will not repeat it.
errors.permission.denied: This external action was denied. Your existing work remains saved.
errors.agent_runtime.review_required: The Agent result is ready for review.
errors.agent_runtime.turn_cancelled: The Agent turn was cancelled. You can retry it.
errors.agent_runtime.turn_conflict: This conversation changed before the turn could be saved. Review the latest messages and try again.
errors.agent_runtime.turn_in_progress: This Agent turn is already in progress.
errors.agent_runtime.tool_dependency_wai: The Agent is waiting for a required local capability.
errors.agent_runtime.source_turn_failed: The Agent could not process this source. Try again.
errors.url_fetch.blocked: Pige blocked this web address because it is unsafe or targets a private network.
errors.url_fetch.cancelled: The web source fetch was cancelled. You can retry it.
errors.url_fetch.failed: Pige could not fetch this web source. Check the address and try again.
errors.url_fetch.invalid: Enter a valid public HTTP or HTTPS web address.
errors.vault.not_selected: Open or create a vault before asking Pi Agent.
errors.vault.reveal_failed: Pige could not show this storage location. Try again.
language.label: Language
library.empty: No notes or source pages yet.
library.emptyDescription: Add a source or start a conversation; durable local pages will appear here.
library.loadingDescription: Notes and sources remain local; the list will appear when it is ready.
library.unavailableDescription: Local knowledge was not deleted. Retry this read without choosing the vault again.
library.searchUnavailableDescription: Your local knowledge was not changed. Retry this search when you are ready.
library.searchDegraded: Showing local fallback results while the search index is being rebuilt.
library.matchReason.title: Title match
library.tagsUnavailableDescription: Notes, sources, and topics are available now. Tag results will appear here when local tag indexing is available.
library.subtitle: Local Markdown metadata, without model processing.
library.title: Library
library.type.question: Question
knowledgeTree.canvas: Knowledge Tree canvas. Use arrow keys to move between nodes and Enter to focus.
knowledgeTree.degradedDescription: Markdown and sources remain safe. Retry the local index without importing them again.
knowledgeTree.empty: Knowledge Tree has no content yet
knowledgeTree.emptyDescription: Add notes or sources and Pige can surface real relationships without inventing nodes.
knowledgeTree.error: Pige could not open Knowledge Tree.
knowledgeTree.loadingDescription: Notes and sources remain available while the local index gets ready.
knowledgeTree.subtitle: See where knowledge is growing and how ideas connect.
knowledgeTree.title: Knowledge Tree
maintenance.resetCopy: Reset deletes only rebuildable database, index, and cache files. Notes and source assets stay in the vault.
maintenance.title: Index and Maintenance
models.addCustomModelDescription: Use only when this service does not list a model or an additional model ID is required.
models.apiKeyDescription: Stored in the system keychain or encrypted storage; never written to the vault or backups.
models.automaticSyncDescription: Models sync after connection and can also be refreshed manually.
models.baseUrlDescription: Use HTTPS or a standard loopback address on this device.
models.chooseProviderDescription: Choose a reviewed service, or reveal technical fields only for a custom provider.
models.connectionDetailsDescription: Presets hide protocol and endpoint; custom services expose them in details.
models.connectionDisclosure: Connecting continuously authorizes this exact service to process selected ordinary, private, and bounded-large content. Sensitive content still requires confirmation; restricted content is never sent; an unknown or changed boundary is confirmed again.
models.customProbeDisclosure: Pige performs one provider-level generation and tool-call check before saving this connection; it does not test every model.
models.customProviderDescription: For compatible or self-hosted endpoints that require an explicit protocol and Base URL.
models.displayNameDescription: Used only to identify this service in Pige.
models.modelIdDescription: Enter the exact model ID exposed by this service.
models.modelListDescription: Synced and custom models are merged by service and model ID.
models.noCredentialDescription: This local service can be checked without an API key.
models.noProvidersDescription: Connect one model service to let Pi Agent answer and work with your knowledge.
models.presetDescription: Preset services hide protocol and the default endpoint; enter only the required credential.
models.protocolDescription: Must match the API actually supported by this service.
models.providerDetailsDescription: Manage this service's single model inventory, refresh discovery, and add a model ID only when needed.
models.providerUnavailable: This provider is no longer available. Return to Models and choose another service.
models.routingNote: Advanced/Fast model roles, workflow routing, pricing, and capability matrices stay hidden until they have real runtime behavior.
models.connectionFailed: Connection failed. Check the protocol, Base URL, model ID, and API key, then try again.
models.discoveryFailed: Model refresh failed. Retry or add a custom model.
models.bootstrapModelRequired: Choose one model for the connection check. Nothing is saved until it passes.
models.modelChangeFailed: The model setting could not be saved. Try again.
models.manualModelFailed: The custom model could not be added. Check the model ID and try again.
models.refreshAfterSaveFailed: The change was saved, but the model list could not be refreshed. Retry the refresh.
models.summaryRefreshFailed: Models could not be loaded. Retry.
models.noModel: No model is connected yet. Pige will stay in capture-only mode.
models.presetConnectionFailedApiKey: The connection check failed. Check the API key and try again.
models.presetConnectionFailedNoAuth: The connection check failed. Try again.
models.subtitle: Connect one model service that Pi Agent can call.
models.title: Models
note.document.copy_failed: Pige could not copy this note.
note.agentEmpty: Ask a question grounded in the current note.
note.agentModelMenu: Choose a model for this note
note.agentModelSwitchFailed: The model could not be changed.
note.agentWorking: Pi Agent is reading this note...
proposal.error.decision: Pige could not save this decision.
proposal.error.load: Pige could not open this proposal.
proposal.status.conflicted: The target changed. Nothing was overwritten.
proposal.status.not_allowed: This proposal cannot be applied in this version.
proposal.status.not_found: This proposal is no longer available.
proposal.status.unknown: The decision status is unknown. Close and reopen this proposal before taking another action.
recent.title: Recent vaults
dataset.truncated: The result was narrowed to the safe display limit.
retrieval.cloudSent: Selected evidence was sent to your cloud model.
retrieval.degraded: The local index is being repaired, so results may be incomplete.
retrieval.insufficientEvidence: There is not enough local evidence to answer this question.
retrieval.limitedEvidence: Only one relevant note was found. Treat this summary as limited evidence.
retrieval.modelGrounded: Pi Agent · grounded in local knowledge
sourceStorage.copy: Copy dropped files into Pige source storage
sourceStorage.title: Source storage
settings.general.alwaysOnTopDescription: Keep the current Pige window above other windows.
settings.general.subtitle: Language and window behavior that are already available.
settings.general.title: General
settings.subtitle: Manage Pige without changing the main window layout.
settings.title: Settings
skills.emptyDescription: Skill inventory will appear after Skill Registry is available. Nothing has been read or changed yet.
skills.reviewMetadata: Source, files, and warnings stay visible
skills.reviewMetadataDescription: Pige will show the package source, version, included files, and verification warnings.
skills.reviewPermissionsDescription: Network, file, tool, and model access must pass the Permission Broker.
skills.scopeDescription: A Skill cannot silently gain access to other vaults or broader data.
skills.subtitle: Manage small knowledge workflows. External capabilities show their permission boundaries before they can be enabled.
skills.title: Skills
support.category.appRuntimeDescription: App version, platform, and architecture used for diagnosis.
support.category.binariesDescription: Local models, parser binaries, packages, and source artifacts stay excluded.
support.category.diagnosticsHealthDescri: Redacted operational status without private content.
support.category.privateContentDescripti: Full notes, sources, conversations, memory, prompts, and model responses stay excluded.
support.category.recentErrorsDescription: Only bounded, redacted error summaries are included.
support.category.secretsDescription: API keys, tokens, cookies, and credentials stay excluded.
support.exportFailed: Pige could not export the support bundle safely. Try again.
support.previewUnsafe: Pige cannot safely describe every preview item. Export is unavailable until the preview is refreshed.
support.warning.localOnly: The bundle is created locally and is never uploaded automatically.
support.warning.redacted: Paths, email addresses, and common secret patterns are redacted by default.
support.warning.review: Review every included and excluded category before exporting.
system.autoDownloadDescription: This preference will be available after Update Service is connected.
system.clearDiagnosticsDescription: Does not affect notes, sources, memory, conversations, Jobs, or operations. This control is not available yet.
system.exported: The redacted support bundle was exported locally.
system.healthDescription: Local diagnostics report only body-free operational health.
system.healthFailed: Pige could not refresh local health right now.
system.localOnlyNote: Pige v0.1 does not automatically upload diagnostics and includes no product analytics or background telemetry.
system.previewFailed: Pige could not prepare a safe support bundle preview.
system.subtitle: Updates stay quiet. Diagnostics remain local and are previewed and redacted before export.
system.supportBundleDescription: Preview before export. Paths, secrets, bodies, prompts, and model responses are excluded by default.
system.title: Updates & Diagnostics
system.updateChannelDescription: Available update channels will appear after Update Service is connected.
system.updateStatusDescription: Signature, checksum, and version checks will appear here when Update Service is connected.
system.updateUnavailable: Update Service is in development. Nothing was changed.
vaultSettings.revealSucceeded: Opened in the system file manager.
vaultSettings.subtitle: Local files remain the source of truth.
vaultSettings.title: Vault & Note Storage
